zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前BNB/USD整体呈现窄幅震荡偏弱结构，价格持续运行在609.95的20日均线下方，短线动能不足，市场缺乏明确方向，更偏向整理蓄势阶段。整体波动极低，显示资金观望情绪较浓。

MACD指标维持负值区间，显示空头动能仍占优势，但未出现明显放量下跌，说明下行趋势并不强烈；在缺少RSI参考下，可通过均线与价格结构判断动能偏弱。

下方关键支撑位集中在604.70附近，一旦失守可能进一步下探603甚至600整数关口；上方阻力首先看609.95均线位置，其次615区域构成阶段性强压带。

操作上建议以区间思路应对，短线更适合高抛低吸策略，等待价格有效突破609上方或跌破604下方后再顺势跟进，同时注意控制仓位并严格设置止损。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB is currently trading at 605.21, sitting just below the 20-period SMA at 609.95, which places the short-term structure in a mild bearish posture. Price action has compressed tightly between 604.73 and 605.43, indicating a low-volatility consolidation phase. This kind of narrowing range often reflects market indecision after a prior directional move, with momentum temporarily stalled. Until price reclaims the 610 region, upside momentum remains limited and bias leans neutral-to-slightly bearish.

From a momentum perspective, the MACD reading of -2.82787 confirms that bearish pressure is still present, even if it is not aggressively expanding. Without a visible signal line value, confirmation is incomplete, but the sub-zero reading suggests that recent momentum favors sellers. RSI data is unavailable, but the extremely tight price range implies equilibrium conditions rather than overbought or oversold extremes. In this environment, momentum signals are less trend-defining and more useful for breakout anticipation.

Key support is located at 604.73, which is the immediate lower boundary of the current range. A breakdown below this level would likely expose the psychological 600 zone, followed by deeper support if selling accelerates. On the upside, resistance is first encountered at the 20-SMA near 610, which is also the first meaningful technical barrier. Beyond that, 615 and then 620 represent secondary resistance zones aligned with prior reaction highs and potential supply areas.

Trading conditions favor range strategies in the short term, with disciplined entries near support and resistance extremes. Long positions are better considered only on a confirmed break and hold above 610, ideally with expanding momentum toward 615–620. Conversely, a clean breakdown below 604.73 could open short opportunities targeting 600. Given the compression in volatility, tight risk management is essential, as breakout moves can develop quickly and invalidate range assumptions.
